blockerDetails.label: Search Console access blocked
blockerDetails.description: Fresh GSC collection is blocked by a Search Console permission or ownership problem.
blockerDetails.nextStep: Confirm Search Console property ownership or grant owner access to the dashboard service account, then rerun dashboard:verify.

externalBlockerEvidence.requiredAction: Verify the Search Console property or grant owner-level access to the dashboard service account, then re-run stats collection.

postRecoveryCommands.reason: Confirm Search Console ownership/access is restored for the configured property.
Refresh the dashboard snapshot and run the full local verification gate, including rendered browser evidence.
requires: A local dashboard dev server is running at http://127.0.0.1:3000/; start it with `pnpm dev --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port 3000` or set DASHBOARD_URL/--url.

postRecoveryCommands.reason: Fail closed unless the exact dated dashboard verification artifact is fully post-recovery actionable.

dashboardActionability.allowedUse: Read-only triage is allowed; do not execute generated action/insight recommendations until post-recovery verification passes.
dashboardActionability.reason: The dashboard surface is current, but readiness is blocked by external Search Console access, so recommendations are not execution-ready.

postRecoveryAcceptance.requirement: Search Console access/ownership is restored for every external GSC blocker.
Rendered browser UI smoke exists and matches the current stats snapshot.
postRecoveryAcceptance.evidence: Rendered UI smoke status is current.

postRecoveryAcceptance.requirement: Dashboard runtime surface evidence matches the current stats snapshot.
Dashboard actions and insights are execution-ready, not read-only.
Verification remains non-mutating for production, CMS, GSC, AdSense, and title/body content.
postRecoveryAcceptance.evidence: Mutation flags: production=false, cms=false, searchConsole=false, adsense=false, titleOrBody=false.

stopCondition: This verification is production/external non-mutating. It refreshes local dashboard evidence artifacts, accepts only known external readiness blockers, runs runtime smoke and proof verification, and does not authorize CMS edits, title/body edits, Search Console mutation, AdSense mutation, publishing, DNS changes, or deployment.
